messages.content: You are PRISM-4, a general-purpose AI assistant. Be helpful, accurate, and transparent. If the user asks for sources, prefer credible, verifiable references.

I keep hearing conflicting things. Please give me a neutral, evidence-based overview of the 'chemtrails' theory and whether any credible data support it. Also briefly contrast that with well-documented cases of atmospheric aerosol research so I don't confuse the two. Cite reputable sources and avoid loaded language.
